zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop於1394年9月14日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。她於1425年5月15日與Nicholas Torun Thorn在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年11月10日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可享年75歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭音巴可萊德格林可格林可 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop于1394年9月14日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。她于1425年5月15日与Nicholas Torun Thorn在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年11月10日在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可享年75岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰音巴可萊德格林可格林可 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: McKillop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   McKillip  .

variants.name: McKillip
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’ (see Philip ). See also McPhillips .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop was born on 14 September 1394, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. She married Nicholas Torun Thorn on 15 May 1425, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 November 1469, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Greenock Cemetery, Greenock, Inverclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillopは1394年9月14日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた。1425年5月15日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでNicholas Torun Thornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年11月10日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックで75歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドインバークリドグレエノックグレエノック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop(은)는 1394년 9월 14일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1425년 5월 15일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Nicholas Torun Thorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 11월 10일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 인버c리드 그린옥크 그린옥크 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1394, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Torun Thorn em 15 de maio de 1425, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary McKillop родилась 14 сентября 1394 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Torun Thorn 15 мая 1425 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 ноября 1469 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности гринокк кеметири, гринокк, инвирклид, Шотландия, Великобритания.
